lines.speaker: Text
lines.english: My name is Amal and I am a student. I live with my family in a small house. I wake up at six every morning and go to school at eight. I study English and mathematics. After school, I help my family and do my homework. On Friday, I visit my grandmother. I like rice and chicken, and I usually drink tea. This week I have an English lesson on Tuesday.
lines.somali: Qoraalku wuxuu ka hadlayaa qof, qoys, routine, school, food iyo weekly plan. Akhri ka hor su’aalaha.
